name: claude-workflow-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code workflow plugins: discuss (design discussion mode) and orchestrate (orchestrator mode for expensive main models).

plugins.name: discuss
plugins.description: Design discussion mode: /discuss blocks file edits via a lock file and a bundled PreToolUse hook; /discuss end summarizes outcomes and stops at the junction for the user to choose the next step.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Orchestrator mode for expensive main models: keep planning, verification, and commits in the main session and delegate implementation to the bundled implementer subagent.
